title: Winter River — Node Status
description: Power chain state for all 25 ESP32 nodes (Side A, Side B, server_rack). Refresh: 5s.

targets.query:
from(bucket: "mqtt_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id == "utility_a")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "state")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "mqtt_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r.node_id == "mv_switchgear_a")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "state")
  |> last()

from(bucket: "mqtt_metrics")
  |> range(start: v.timeRangeStart, stop: v.timeRangeStop)
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._measurement == "mqtt_consumer")
  |> filter(fn: (r) => r._field == "load_pct")
  |> aggregateWindow(every: v.windowPeriod, fn: mean, createEmpty: false)
  |> yield(name: "mean")
